name: inky
description: Per-workspace color themes stored outside your repo or user profile, synced across devices using Settings Sync and global state.

inky.logging.description: Enable the Inky output channel for diagnostics. When disabled, no channel is created and nothing is logged. Takes effect immediately.

inky.syncPolling.enabled.description: Poll globalState for Settings Sync changes from other machines. Disable if you only use one machine or prefer restart-based sync.

inky.syncPolling.intervalSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to check for Settings Sync updates from other machines. Only applies when polling is enabled.

commands.title: Inky: Set theme for this workspace
Inky: Clear theme for this workspace
Inky: List / manage all workspace themes
Inky: Debug — dump global state to console
Inky: Reset — clear ALL saved data
